title: What Can AI Do For Dentistry?
article: AI has become an integral part of our daily lives, from smartphones to self-driving cars. But have you ever thought that dentists could use AI too? Here's how AI is transforming dentistry.

title: What Can AI Do For Dentistry?
article:
1. Cavities

Generally, cavities can only be detected through dental exams or X-rays. Now, dentists can use AI to find potential cavities that are invisible to the naked eye. AI can also compare current and past X-rays to see if cavities have grown over time. This enables dentists to offer more cost-effective treatments.

title: What Can AI Do For Dentistry?
article:
2. Gum Disease

AI technology can also help dentists detect gum disease. It measures bone levels around teeth to identify bone loss. By comparing X-rays, AI shows whether a patient's gum disease is stable or worsening. This allows dentists to better assess gum conditions and determine specific treatment plans.

title: What Can AI Do For Dentistry?
article:
3. Office Tasks

AI can also assist with administrative tasks, such as compiling large amounts of patient data, processing insurance claims, and scheduling appointments. This frees up dental staff to focus more on providing the best possible care to patients.
